— Vgl. yavanikā.

results.rendered_html:
javanikā, javanī [ju karaṇe lyuṭ saṃjñāyāṃ kan]
1 A screen of cloth surrounding a tent.
2 A curtain in general; naraḥ saṃsārāṃte viśati yamadhānījavanikāṃ  Bh. 3. 112. 
3 The sail of a boat.
